title: rubus × coriifolius
intro: Rubus × coriifolius, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × coriifolius include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × coriifolius can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
